repo.description: This is a Phi Family of SLMs book for getting started with Phi Models. Phi a family of open sourced AI models developed by Microsoft. Phi models are the most capable and cost-effective small language models (SLMs) available, outperforming models of the same size and next size up across a variety of language, reasoning, coding, and math benchmarks
